availability.operator: RMRL (Roja Muthiah Research Library) / Tamil Nadu Archaeology Dept
availability.technology: Flutter web app backed by Firebase/Firestore

access_methods.firestore_api: Requires Google OAuth via the web app — not publicly accessible
access_methods.contact: RMRL, Chennai — scholarly access may be available on request

alternative_sources.holdat_llc: 1,670 seals with Mahadevan numbering (already in corpus)
alternative_sources.cisi_mayig: 179 Mohenjo-daro inscriptions with Parpola numbering (already in corpus)

availability.recommendation: The M77 concordance data we already have from the OCR'd text + Holdat corpus covers the same underlying dataset. The indusscript.in app adds a digital interface but the raw data is the same M77 concordance. Priority should be acquiring the ICIT (Fuls/Wells) corpus which has 4,537 inscriptions including multi-line texts not in M77.
